name: Sanyo Engineering & Construction Inc.
summary: Sanyo Engineering & Construction Inc. engages in the electric facility construction business in Tokyo and internationally. The company designs and constructs electrical and instrumentation equipment in various buildings and production facilities, and environment-related and private finance initiative businesses; power generation equipment; and air conditioning and ventilation equipment, and fire extinguishing equipment, as well as water supply, drainage, and sanitary equipment in office buildings, commercial facilities, entertainment facilities, hotels, condominiums, medical and welfare facilities, school and research facilities, road and harbor facilities, and various production facilities. It also renovates electric, air conditioning, and sanitary equipment in various facilities, as well as handles environment related business, including energy saving, eco multi heat pump systems, and ESCO. In addition, the company undertakes electric power transmission, electric power generation and substation, underground line, electric power distribution, and wind-power generation equipment works, as well as develops technical development and applied products. Further, it is involved in the information and communication related works comprising iron communication tower, steel pipe pole, mobile phone base station, and communication station house equipment works; design and construction of optical fiber and metal communication lines; civil engineering and steel structural works; painting, interior finishing, and survey works; and production and sale of electric equipment, as well as the provision of construction consultancy and worker dispatch services. Additionally, the company designs, constructs, and maintains electrical and mechanical equipment works for various facilities; and designs and fabricates high and low voltage distribution panels, power and control panels, and safety grounding tools for overhead electric lines; and buys, sells, rents, and manages real estate properties. Sanyo Engineering & Construction Inc. was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
